channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Oil prices fall after Iran sends updated peace proposal to mediators in Pakistan
item.description: Under the 1973 War Powers Resolution, a U.S. president needs to withdraw troops 60 days after reporting their deployment to Congress

item.title: A major shift could soon happen in the Mag 7
item.description: Quietly, shares of Google-parent Alphabet are on the verge of topping $5 trillion, and overtaking AI-leader Nvidia as the world's most valuable company.

item.title: UK exports to U.S. plunge by 25% after Trump's 'liberation day' tariffs blitz
item.description: The U.K. is now running a trade deficit with its largest trading partner.

item.title: Atlassian stock soars 20% after earnings show strong cloud, data center growth
item.description: Atlassian's stock has been hit hard in the "SaaS-pocalypse" sweeping software names as AI threatens to disrupt their business models.

item.title: Lutnick gets grilling on Nvidia chip sales to China in letter from Sen. Chris Coons
item.description: Sen. Chris Coons demanded answers on H200 chips sales to China after Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and the Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang give differing answers.

item.title: Roblox shares plummet 18% as child safety measures weigh on bookings
item.description: Roblox is facing over 140 federal lawsuits accusing it of failing to prevent child exploitation, and last month settled with Alabama and West Virginia.

item.title: Pentagon tech chief says Anthropic is still blacklisted, but Mythos is a separate issue
item.description: The DOD announced it has entered into agreements with seven other AI companies.

item.title: Elon Musk billionaires bill supporters draw progressive challengers in Delaware
item.description: Musk, whose record pay package was in legal limbo in Delaware, relocated Tesla's incorporation out of state during the spat.

item.title: Trump scraps Scotch whisky tariffs ‘in honor’ of King Charles
item.description: The move is expected to recoup millions of dollars a month for Scotland’s economy.

item.title: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
item.description: Federal Reserve officials who voted this week against the post-meeting statement said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.

item.title: Inside the Fed: Powell vows he won't be a 'shadow chair,' but a Warsh clash will be tough to avoid
item.description: When the Fed gathers again, it will mark the first time a sitting and former chair conduct business together in nearly 80 years.

item.title: Berkshire shares struggle into annual meeting. Can Abel rekindle enthusiasm without Buffett center stage?
item.description: For the first time, the 95-year-old Buffett won't be the central figure on stage, marking a new era for one of investing's most closely watched rituals.

item.title: K-shaped economy is 'alive and well,' expert says — what new research shows
item.description: The so-called K-shaped economy is becoming more clearly defined, new reports show.

item.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook warns of extended memory crunch. 'We'll look at a range of options'
item.description: In Apple's quarterly earnings report, CEO Tim Cook warned of further memory constraints in the coming quarters.

item.title: Smoothie King plots expansion as wellness trends boost sales
item.description: Smoothie King's system-wide sales have climbed 64% over the last five years.

item.title: Apollo Sports Capital and Tom Dundon make landmark $225 million investment in pickleball
item.description: The fresh funds bring the total investment in Pickleball Inc. to $315 million, as investors continue to look at emerging sports as a place to park their money.

item.title: AstraZeneca stock falls after FDA panel votes against new cancer drug
item.description: The advisory panel wasn't convinced that a clinical trial proved that early switching to camizestrant improved long-term survival rates.

item.title: Video shows Cole Allen scouting hotel, storming checkpoint in alleged Trump assassination attempt
item.description: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said there's no evidence that a Secret Service officer shot at the Washington Hilton was the victim of friendly fire.

item.title: Japan risks Trump’s ire as Iran war fallout sparks currency intervention
item.description: “FX intervention will only get them so far,” one strategist said after the yen surged.

item.title: Reddit reports 69% jump in revenue, topping analyst estimates
item.description: Reddit reported first-quarter earnings and revenue that exceeded Wall Street expectations.

item.title: Veeva Systems to join S&P 500 index, replacing Coterra Energy
item.description: Veeva's stock has been hit this year along with the rest of cloud software as investors fear the impact of AI.

item.title: House strips MAHA-hated pesticide provisions from farm bill
item.description: MAHA advocates said the language that was stripped could have provided liability protection for Bayer in lawsuits involving its Roundup weedkiller.

item.title: Apple revenue guidance tops estimates on booming iPhone, Mac demand
item.description: Apple reported 17% revenue growth, topping estimates, even as iPhone sales came up short.

item.title: Jim Cramer says the market’s biggest winners all have one thing in common
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he only sees two sectors in the market these days — the data center stocks and everything else.

item.title: Japan Airlines begins humanoid robot trials at Tokyo's Haneda airport as labor shortages bite
item.description: Tokyo's Haneda Airport is beginning a trial of humanoid robots in airport ground services amid chronic labor challenges and a rapidly ageing workforce.

item.title: China’s EV price war turns into AI arms race beyond cheaper cars
item.description: Chinese EV firms are rapidly rolling out in-car AI features to gain an edge, but as the price war drags on, those technologies are quickly becoming commoditized.

item.title: AI boom: Big Tech capital expenditures now seen topping $1 trillion in 2027
item.description: The overall cost has been causing heads to spin, but analysts say they're seeing flowthrough from investments to revenue.

item.title: FISA Section 702: Congress passes short-term surveillance program extension just before deadline
item.description: The controversial foreign surveillance program was due to expire by the end of Thursday.

item.title: In the U.S., CEO pay grew 20 times faster than workers' wages in 2025, says Oxfam
item.description: A new report from Oxfam found that CEOs' earnings continue to grow even as workers' wages stagnate.

item.title: China’s self-driving truck leaders say AI breakthroughs won’t accelerate rollout — here’s why
item.description: Rapid advances in AI for coding and chatbots doesn't change the timeline for getting self-driving vehicles on the road, industry executives in China said.
